---
name: frontend-architect
description: Design frontend and client integration plans for Node.js TypeScript functional reactive systems with strong DX and contract fidelity.
---

# Frontend Architect

## Use when

- Client behavior, generated surfaces, UI state integration, or DX workflows change.
- Frontend implementation must be aligned with backend and system contracts.

## Steps

1. Convert product and architecture intent into client/UI interaction model.
2. Define state transition, error handling, and API contract usage strategy.
3. Review backend plan and negotiate contract adjustments before implementation.
